mapper.sql: id, parent_id, name, code, manager_id, sort_order, is_active, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM erp_departments ORDER BY sort_order ASC, name ASC
SELECT FROM erp_departments WHERE name = #{name} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM erp_departments WHERE parent_id = #{parentId}::uuid ORDER BY sort_order ASC, name ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO erp_departments (id, parent_id, name, code, manager_id, sort_order, is_active, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ( #{id}::uuid, #{parentId}::uuid, #{name}, #{code}, #{managerId}::uuid, #{sortOrder}, #{isActive}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE erp_departments SET parent_id = #{parentId}::uuid, name = #{name}, code = #{code}, manager_id = #{managerId}::uuid, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, is_active = #{isActive}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}::uuid
